goal: Load gene expression data and phenotype measurements, calculate correlations, and generate statistical visualization

assertions.description: User received correlation coefficient results between genes and phenotypes
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Output contains specific correlation values (r) for gene-phenotype pairs

assertions.description: Statistical significance was reported with p-values
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Results include p-values and significance indicators for correlations

assertions.description: Visualization was generated showing the correlation relationships
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Generated plot file (PNG/PDF) shows scatter plots or heatmap of correlations
Final summary explains biological significance of significant correlations

assertions.description: CSV MCP loaded gene expression dataset successfully
assertions.evaluation_criteria: csv_mcp.create_csv() or csv_mcp.query_csv() called with gene expression file

assertions.description: CSV MCP loaded phenotype dataset successfully
assertions.evaluation_criteria: csv_mcp tool used to load phenotype measurements file

assertions.description: R Script MCP executed statistical correlation analysis
assertions.evaluation_criteria: r_script_mcp.execute_r_code() called with correlation functions (cor.test, cor)

assertions.description: Data validation occurred before statistical analysis
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Workflow included checks for missing values, data types, or normality

assertions.description: Results were properly formatted and saved to workspace
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Statistical results saved as CSV or text file in workspace directory

assertions.description: Visualization generation used appropriate plotting tools
assertions.evaluation_criteria: R Script MCP or Shell MCP executed plotting commands (ggplot2, matplotlib)
